package router

import "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"

func RegisterSloppyRoutes(engine *gin.Engine) {
    repo := NewUserRepository()
    client := NewClient()
    repo.Query().Where("status = ?", "active").First(&struct{}{})
    other := NewClient()
    _ = client
    _ = other
    engine.GET("/admin", func(c *gin.Context) {})
    engine.GET("/admin", func(c *gin.Context) {})
    StartWorker()
    StartCron()
    Migrate()
    engine.Run()
}
